page_metadata.biotools__summary: Evolutionary trace (ET) report maker pools information from different sources including databases and on-the-fly multiple sequence analysis to produce a pdf formatted document as output. The emphasis is on prediction of functional sites of proteins.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Evolutionary trace (ET) report maker pools information from different sources including databases and on-the-fly multiple sequence analysis to produce a pdf formatted document as output. The emphasis is on prediction of functional sites of proteins.
